name: Mom's New England Fish Chowder
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Haddock Or Firm White Fish
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil the potatoes and onion in enough water to cover until they are almost tender.
2. Add diced fish pieces and cook slowly until the potatoes are fully cooked. Ensure the fish is not overcooked.
3. Stir in one 12-ounce can of condensed milk and one 5-ounce can of condensed milk, then simmer until all ingredients are heated through.
4. Add butter, salt, and pepper to taste. Serve with fresh baked muffins.
